hero.title: Build Your Vision with Ease
hero.subtitle: A fully customizable landing page template that adapts to your brand identity in seconds.

features.title: JSON Driven
features.description: Change your entire website's look and feel by simply editing a single JSON file.

features.title: Responsive Design
features.description: Your landing page looks great on every device, from mobile to desktop.

features.title: Modern Aesthetic
features.description: Built with the latest design trends using Tailwind CSS and Motion.

about.title: About Our Platform
about.text: We believe that building a web presence should be as simple as editing a document. Our JSON-driven architecture allows you to focus on your content while we handle the presentation.
